sourcesContent: ## Examples This component loops through an array of partials an exposed a slot to use customize each partial. ### Basic example It renders a list of partial results using the default slot: ```vue ``` ### Configuring the number of partials It sets the maximum partials to show to 3. ```vue ``` ### Rendering usage It renders a list of partial results using the default slot. It will show the query, the partial results and a button to update the query with the partial one. ```vue ```
